app.header.subtitle: Local Agent Workspace
app.meta.title: Antigravity-Go Workspace
app.commander.title: Handle tasks, code, and verification in one place.
app.commander.subtitle: Chat, execution state, and key logs stay visible here. Files, code, and terminal open on demand when you need them.
app.control_plane.title: Main Workspace
app.control_plane.subtitle: Tasks, approvals, and runtime status stay centralized here.

settings.title: Model Service Settings
settings.placeholder.api_key: Enter the access key. Leave empty for local models
settings.save_success: Settings have been saved and applied.
chat.approval_timeout: The approval request timed out and was automatically denied. Please trigger the action again.
chat.feedback.positive: Thanks for the feedback. I will keep improving.
chat.feedback.negative: Feedback received. I will improve the output quality.
chat.panel.title: Chat
chat.hero.title: Start with this repository
chat.hero.subtitle: Enter a task or pick a common check. The workspace returns execution progress, results, and relevant files.
chat.telemetry.title: Session Metrics
chat.input.placeholder: Enter a task or question. Enter sends, Shift+Enter adds a newline.
chat.prompt.project_map: Please summarize the current repository structure and explain the responsibility of each key module.
chat.prompt.risk_review: Please review the current agent-related implementation and identify potential bugs, boundary conditions, and concurrency risks.
chat.prompt.architecture: Please explain the overall architecture of this project and the main data flow between modules.

mcp.form.title: Add or Update Service
mcp.form.subtitle: Write declarative config into the core and trigger dynamic tool refresh
mcp.form.read_only_subtitle: This core version only supports MCP status or resource visibility, not management or invocation.

One KEY=VALUE per line
